description:
Lease and QueueLease have identical implementations of:
- expired?/1 (lease.ex:62-65, queue_lease.ex:41-44)
- remaining_ms/1 (lease.ex:71-74, queue_lease.ex:49-52)

Extract to shared module Bedrock.JobQueue.LeaseHelpers or use a protocol.
~15 lines reduction + DRY.
title: Extract shared lease expiration helpers
